case_title: PINEIRO, ANTONIO et al vs. TRAHAN, SARA CHRISTINE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PINEIRO, ANTONIO RODRIGUEZ, IRENE RODRIGUEZ, JOSE FERNANDEZ, FERNANDO AS TO DEFENDANT TRAHAN, SARA CHRISTINE ADAMS, JAMES DOES 1 TO 25 TRAHAN, ADAM SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-18-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-19-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-30-1997
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-24-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-24-1997, OFF CALENDAR

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-18-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ENRIQUE RAMIREZ. HEARING SET FOR AUG-27-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-27-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. TO FILE A NEW STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAYS BEFORE HEARING. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY RAMIREZ ENRIQUE,, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-11-1997 CONTINUED FROM AUG-27-1997 TO OCT-29-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 1, 5, 9 TO BE TRAHAN, ADAM
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF PINEIRO, ANTONIO RODRIGUEZ, IRENE RODRIGUEZ, JOSE FERNANDEZ, FERNANDO
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE THIS DISMISSAL WILL NOT ACT AS A RETRAXIT
